## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

Please check the relevant options:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test addition or update
- [ ] CI/CD or build configuration change
- [ ] Style/UI change

## Checklist

Please check all that apply:

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have added necessary documentation (JSDoc comments, README updates, etc.)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have run `npm test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run linting (`npm run lint`) and fixed any issues
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] I have tested in multiple browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- [ ] I have tested the React components (if modified)

## Testing

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual browser testing
- [ ] React component testing

```bash
# How to run the tests
npm test

# Build and test the widget
npm run build
```
